steps.title: Identify the triangle parts
steps.content: The figure is a right triangle. Its legs are $4$ and $b$, and its hypotenuse is $19$.

steps.title: Apply the theorem
steps.content: For a right triangle, the sum of the squares of the legs equals the square of the hypotenuse: $$ 4^2+b^2=19^2 $$ The answer is C.
